claims.text: The runner builds a reproducible artifact bundle for 20 review experiments.
The bundle includes paper, review, labels, and run metadata.
No post-fallback run has been executed yet.

review_layers.text: The paper does not run the fallback after adding the evidence bundle.
evidence: Paper states that no post-fallback run has been executed yet.

review_layers.text: The bundle is only tested on 20 review experiments.
evidence: No deterministic fixture rule matched this criticism.

review_layers.text: The authors should optimize GPU kernel performance for the runner.
evidence: Review request is outside the paper's stated research claim or scope.

selected_experiment.hypothesis: Run or dry-run the fallback on the 30-item fixture
